evals.prompt: Format and commit my changes with message 'chore: update openspec artifacts to reflect items removal'
evals.expected_output: Runs npm run format and npm run lint:fix, stages all changes, commits with the provided message plus Co-Authored-By trailer, then pushes.

evals.prompt: Format the code and push — figure out a good commit message yourself
evals.expected_output: Runs formatters, inspects the diff, writes a concise conventional commit message (type: description), stages, commits, and pushes.

evals.prompt: Run formatters and commit, but don't push yet
evals.expected_output: Runs npm run format and npm run lint:fix, stages, commits — then stops before pushing because the user said 'don't push yet'.
